<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/145.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.6.0" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="PsalUphiTuZxmKy_I1A5"> <mxGraphModel dx="1665" dy="743" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{"data":"@startuml
left to right direction
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

class Platforma

class Vizitator {
 +vizualizareProduse()
 +cautareProduse()
 +creareCont()
}

class Client {
 +gestionareCos()
 +plasareComanda()
 +efectuarePlata()
 +urmarireComanda()
 +gestionareCont()
}

class Administrator {
 +gestionareUtilizatori()
 +gestionareProduse()
 +gestionareComenzi()
 +generareRapoarte()
}

class Vanzator {
 +adaugareProdus()
 +modificareProdus()
 +stergereProdus()
 +procesareComenzi()
}

class Curier {
 +preluareComanda()
 +livrareComanda()
 +actualizareStatusLivrare()
}

class SistemPlata {
 +procesarePlata()
}

' mostenire: client este un vizitator
Vizitator <|-- Client

Platforma -- Vizitator : ofera acces
Platforma -- Client : furnizeaza servicii
Platforma -- Administrator : permite administrare
Platforma -- Vanzator : permite gestionare produse
Platforma -- Curier : gestioneaza livrari
Platforma -- SistemPlata : integreaza plati

Client -- SistemPlata : initiaza plata
Vanzator -- Curier : transmite comanda
Curier -- Client : livreaza comanda

@enduml","format":"svg"}" id="WsRXJjY8-Y1IPrDVdGKb-1"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="575" width="1528" x="20" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

svg.style: width: 1528px; height: 575px; background: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-family: initial;
